result.stdout:
Usage: dotnet bump-all [options] [command]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information

Commands:
  major     Increase in one the major part of the version.
  minor     Increase in one the minor part of the version.
  patch     Increase in one the patch part of the version.
  revision  Increase in one the revision part of the version.

Use "dotnet bump-all [command] --help" for more information about a command.
Extended

commands.payload:
Usage: dotnet bump-all [options] [command]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information

Commands:
  major     Increase in one the major part of the version.
  minor     Increase in one the minor part of the version.
  patch     Increase in one the patch part of the version.
  revision  Increase in one the revision part of the version.

Use "dotnet bump-all [command] --help" for more information about a command.
Extended

result.stdout:
Usage: dotnet bump-all major [arguments] [options]

Arguments:
  [path-to-project-file]  Path to the .csproj file.

Options:
  -s            Use <VersionPrefix> instead <Version> tag to bump the version.
  --value       Bump version to a fixed value, instead of incrementing by 1.
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information
